diagrams.title: Cache Write Miss Decision Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing decision points when a write miss occurs, branching between write allocate and no-write allocate policies
elements: WA: Fetch Block → Write to Cache → Set Dirty
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the allocation policy decision process on write miss

diagrams.title: Write-Through vs Write-Back with Allocation
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing how different combinations of write policy and allocation policy handle write operations
elements: Write-Back + Write-Allocate: Write→Cache→Set Dirty→Write to Memory on Eviction
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how allocation policies interact with write policies

diagrams.title: Cache Line State Diagram
diagrams.description: State diagram showing valid, invalid, clean, and dirty states of cache lines with transitions
elements: Valid+Dirty: Eviction → Write to Memory → Valid+Clean
Invalid: Read/Write miss → Fetch block → Valid+Clean
diagrams.purpose: Understanding cache line state changes during allocation and eviction
